overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at dusk. The journey progresses from the Wendt Street commercial area through an entertainment district, along a waterfront industrial corridor, and ends stopped at the Jackson Street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with palm trees and glass towers

events.description: accelerating from stop as traffic light turns green at Wendt Street
blue delivery van passes on the right side in parallel lane

agents.ego_description: navigating through downtown traffic, maintaining steady speed along multi-lane avenue lined with neon office buildings

notable_agents.action: blue delivery van driving in parallel lane before turning off

entered.detail: blue street sign with white text mounted on traffic gantry
tall building with teal neon window lights and glass facade
tall palm trees lining the right side of the avenue
overhead metal structure supporting traffic signals and street signs

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates from a stop at the Wendt Street intersection into a neon-lit commercial district. Tall glass towers with teal neon accents line the left side while palm trees dot the right. A blue delivery van passes by in the adjacent lane as the camera moves steadily forward through the multi-lane avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: entertainment district with waterfront promenade and billboards

events.description: exiting dense commercial buildings into open waterfront area with visible water
transitioning from enclosed neon-lit street to open sky with natural dusk light

agents.ego_description: cruising past the Wet Dream entertainment complex, maintaining speed along waterfront boulevard

entered.detail: large entertainment complex with prominent pink neon 'WET DREAM' signage and gold trim
calm waterway running parallel to the road on the right side
large concrete overpass and support columns visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the vehicle leaves the dense commercial blocks, revealing the Wet Dream entertainment complex with its prominent pink neon signage on the left. The right side opens to a waterfront promenade with calm water and elevated highway structures visible in the distance. The lighting shifts from artificial neon dominance to natural dusk sky as the camera progresses along the boulevard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial security corridor beneath elevated highways with neon fencing

events.description: entering industrial zone with Arasaka security facility and corporate signage
passing under large highway overpass structure casting shadows on roadway

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial district, passing security fences and driving beneath massive overpass structures

entered.detail: industrial security building with red triangular warning markers and corporate branding
chain-link fencing illuminated by continuous green and red neon strip lights
massive concrete highway structure with support pillars spanning overhead
large utilitarian building with 'Arasaka Corporation' signage visible

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial security corridor dominated by the Arasaka facility on the right, marked by red warning triangles and neon security fencing. The vehicle drives beneath massive elevated highway overpasses that cast deep shadows across the roadway. Green and red neon lights illuminate the security barriers while corporate signage identifies the industrial buildings lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with highway access ramps and directional signage

events.description: decelerating to stop at red traffic light at Jackson Street intersection
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: decelerating to stop at red light, waiting at Jackson Street intersection with highway access

entered.detail: green street sign with white text indicating Jackson Street
overhead gantry with directional arrows for Westbrook and Santo Domingo
large white billboard displaying vehicle advertisement with 'NEIGHBORS' text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the Jackson Street intersection, decelerating to stop at the red traffic light. Overhead highway directional signs indicate routes to Westbrook and Santo Domingo, while a large billboard stands on the right. The scene is illuminated by warm late-dusk light as the vehicle waits at the crosswalk, with the traffic light changing to green at the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit metropolis that transforms from a commercial district into a corporate industrial corridor at dusk. It begins as the vehicle accelerates from the Wendt Street intersection, moving past teal-accented glass towers and palm trees while passing a blue delivery van. As the dense commercial blocks recede, the scene opens up to reveal the pink neon signage of the Wet Dream entertainment complex and a waterfront promenade, with the lighting shifting from artificial neon to the natural tones of the evening sky. The environment then shifts into a high-security industrial zone dominated by the Arasaka facility, where the camera glides beneath massive highway overpasses and past red warning triangles and security fencing. Finally, the vehicle decelerates to a stop at the Jackson Street intersection under warm late-dusk light, waiting beneath overhead directional signs and a large billboard until the traffic light turns green.
